Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Generalities on the type of integers and integer arithmetic. Vladimir Voevodsky . Aug. - Sep. 2011.

In this file we introduce the type [ hz ] of integers defined as the quotient set of [ dirprod nat nat ] by the standard equivalence relation and develop the main notions of the integer arithmetic using this definition .


*)



(** ** Preamble *)

(** Settings *)

Unset Kernel Term Sharing.

(** Imports *)

Require Export UniMath.Foundations.NaturalNumbers.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.PartA.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]


Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
Require Export UniMath.Algebra.RigsAndRings.
Require Export UniMath.NumberSystems.NaturalNumbersAlgebra.


(** Upstream *)




(** ** The commutative ring [ hz ] of integres *)

(** *** General definitions *)


Definition hz : commring := commrigtocommring natcommrig .
Definition hzaddabgr : abgr := hz .
Definition hzmultabmonoid : abmonoid := ringmultabmonoid hz .

Definition natnattohz : nat -> nat -> hz := λ n m, setquotpr _ ( make_dirprod n m ) .

Definition hzplus : hz -> hz -> hz := @op1 hz.
Definition hzsign : hz -> hz := grinv hzaddabgr .
Definition hzminus : hz -> hz -> hz := λ x y, hzplus x ( hzsign y ) .
Definition hzzero : hz := unel hzaddabgr .

Definition hzmult : hz -> hz -> hz := @op2 hz .
Definition hzone : hz := unel hzmultabmonoid .

Declare Scope hz_scope.
Bind Scope hz_scope with hz .
Notation " x + y " := ( hzplus x y ) : hz_scope .
Notation " 0 " := hzzero : hz_scope .
Notation " 1 " := hzone : hz_scope .
Notation " - x " := ( hzsign x ) : hz_scope .
Notation " x - y " := ( hzminus x y ) : hz_scope .
Notation " x * y " := ( hzmult x y ) : hz_scope .

Delimit Scope hz_scope with hz .


(** *** Properties of equlaity on [ hz ] *)


isdeceq hz


isdeceq hz
 
isdeceq (abgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig))
 
∏ x : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig, isrcancelable op x
isdeceq (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
 
isdeceq (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  apply isdeceqnat .  Defined .
Opaque isdeceqhz.


isaset hz


isaset hz
 apply ( setproperty hzaddabgr ) . Defined .
Opaque isasethz.

Definition hzeq ( x y : hz ) : hProp := make_hProp ( x = y ) ( isasethz _ _  )  .
Definition isdecrelhzeq : isdecrel hzeq  := λ a b, isdeceqhz a b .
Definition hzdeceq : decrel hz := make_decrel isdecrelhzeq .

(* Canonical Structure hzdeceq. *)

Definition hzbooleq := decreltobrel hzdeceq .

Definition hzneq ( x y : hz ) : hProp := make_hProp ( neg ( x = y ) ) ( isapropneg _  )  .
Definition isdecrelhzneq : isdecrel hzneq  := isdecnegrel _ isdecrelhzeq .
Definition hzdecneq : decrel hz := make_decrel isdecrelhzneq .

(* Canonical Structure hzdecneq. *)

Definition hzboolneq := decreltobrel hzdecneq .


Local Open Scope hz_scope .


(** *** [ hz ] is a non-zero ring *)


isnonzerorig hz


isnonzerorig hz
 apply  ( ct ( hzneq , isdecrelhzneq, 1 , 0 ) ) . Defined .


(** *** Properties of addition and subtraction on [ hz ] *)

Definition hzminuszero : ( - 0 ) = 0 := ringinvunel1 hz .


x: hz
x + 0 = x


x: hz
x + 0 = x
 apply ( ringrunax1 _ x ) .  Defined .


x: hz
0 + x = x


x: hz
0 + x = x
 apply ( ringlunax1 _ x ) . Defined .


x, y, z: hz
x + y + z = x + (y + z)


x, y, z: hz
x + y + z = x + (y + z)
 
x, y, z: hz
x + y + z = x + (y + z)
 apply ( ringassoc1 hz x y z ) . Defined .


x, y: hz
x + y = y + x


x, y: hz
x + y = y + x
 
x, y: hz
x + y = y + x
  apply ( ringcomm1 hz x y ) . Defined .


x: hz
- x + x = 0


x: hz
- x + x = 0
 apply ( ringlinvax1 hz x ) . Defined .


x: hz
x - x = 0


x: hz
x - x = 0
 apply ( ringrinvax1 hz x ) . Defined .


n: hz
isincl (λ m : hz, m + n)


n: hz
isincl (λ m : hz, m + n)
 apply ( pr2 ( weqtoincl ( weqrmultingr hzaddabgr n ) ) ) . Defined.


n: hz
isincl (λ m : hz, n + m)


n: hz
isincl (λ m : hz, n + m)
 apply ( pr2 ( weqtoincl ( weqlmultingr hzaddabgr n ) ) ) . Defined .


a, b, c: hz
is: c + a = c + b
a = b


a, b, c: hz
is: c + a = c + b
a = b
 
a, b, c: hz
is: c + a = c + b
a = b
 apply ( @grlcan hzaddabgr a b c is ) .  Defined .


a, b, c: hz
is: a + c = b + c
a = b


a, b, c: hz
is: a + c = b + c
a = b
 
a, b, c: hz
is: a + c = b + c
a = b
 apply ( @grrcan hzaddabgr a b c is ) .  Defined .

Definition hzinvmaponpathsminus { a b : hz } ( e : ( - a ) = ( - b ) ) : a = b := grinvmaponpathsinv hzaddabgr e .


n, m: hz
n + m - m = n


n, m: hz
n + m - m = n

  
n, m: hz
(n + m + (- m)%hz)%ring = n
 
n, m: hz
(n + (m + (- m)%hz))%ring = n

  
n, m: hz
tmp:= hzrminus m: m - m = 0
(n + (m + (- m)%hz))%ring = n
 
n, m: hz
tmp:= hzrminus m: (m + (- m)%hz)%ring = 0
(n + (m + (- m)%hz))%ring = n
 
n, m: hz
tmp:= hzrminus m: (m + (- m)%hz)%ring = 0
(n + 0%hz)%ring = n
 
n, m: hz
(n + 0%hz)%ring = n

  apply hzplusr0.
Defined.
Opaque hzrplusminus.


n, m: hz
n = n + m - m


n, m: hz
n = n + m - m

  
n, m: hz
n + m - m = n
 apply hzrplusminus.
Defined.
Opaque hzrplusminus'.


n, m: hz
n - m + m = n


n, m: hz
n - m + m = n

  
n, m: hz
((n + - m)%hz + m)%ring = n
 
n, m: hz
(n + ((- m)%hz + m))%ring = n

  
n, m: hz
(n + 0%hz)%ring = n
 apply hzplusr0.
Defined.
Opaque hzrminusplus.



n, m: hz
n = n - m + m


n, m: hz
n = n - m + m

  
n, m: hz
n - m + m = n
 apply hzrminusplus.
Defined.
Opaque hzrminusplus'.

(** *** Properties of multiplication on [ hz ] *)



x: hz
x * 1 = x


x: hz
x * 1 = x
 apply ( ringrunax2 _ x ) .  Defined .


x: hz
1 * x = x


x: hz
1 * x = x
 apply ( ringlunax2 _ x ) . Defined .


x: hz
0 * x = 0


x: hz
0 * x = 0
 apply ( ringmult0x _ x ) .  Defined .


x: hz
x * 0 = 0


x: hz
x * 0 = 0
 apply ( ringmultx0 _ x ) . Defined .


x, y, z: hz
x * y * z = x * (y * z)


x, y, z: hz
x * y * z = x * (y * z)
 
x, y, z: hz
x * y * z = x * (y * z)
 apply ( ringassoc2 hz x y z ) . Defined .


x, y: hz
x * y = y * x


x, y: hz
x * y = y * x
 
x, y: hz
x * y = y * x
  apply ( ringcomm2 hz  x y ) . Defined .

Definition hzneq0andmultlinv ( n m : hz ) ( isnm : hzneq ( n * m ) 0 ) : hzneq n 0 := ringneq0andmultlinv hz n m isnm .

Definition hzneq0andmultrinv ( n m : hz ) ( isnm : hzneq ( n * m ) 0 ) : hzneq m 0 := ringneq0andmultrinv hz n m isnm .



(** ** Definition and properties of "greater", "less", "greater or equal" and "less or equal" on [ hz ] . *)


(** *** Definitions and notations *)

Definition hzgth : hrel hz := rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth .

Definition hzlth : hrel hz := λ a b, hzgth b a .

Definition hzleh : hrel hz := λ a b, make_hProp ( neg ( hzgth a b ) ) ( isapropneg _ )  .

Definition hzgeh : hrel hz := λ a b, make_hProp ( neg ( hzgth b a ) ) ( isapropneg _ )  .

(** *** Decidability *)



isdecrel hzgth


isdecrel hzgth
 
isinvbinophrel natgth
isdecrel natgth
  
isdecrel natgth
 apply isdecrelnatgth . Defined .

Definition hzgthdec := make_decrel isdecrelhzgth .

(* Canonical Structure hzgthdec . *)

Definition isdecrelhzlth : isdecrel hzlth := λ x x', isdecrelhzgth x' x .

Definition hzlthdec := make_decrel isdecrelhzlth .

(* Canonical Structure hzlthdec . *)

Definition isdecrelhzleh : isdecrel hzleh := isdecnegrel _ isdecrelhzgth .

Definition hzlehdec := make_decrel isdecrelhzleh .

(* Canonical Structure hzlehdec . *)

Definition isdecrelhzgeh : isdecrel hzgeh := λ x x', isdecrelhzleh x' x .

Definition hzgehdec := make_decrel isdecrelhzgeh .

(* Canonical Structure hzgehdec . *)


(** *** Properties of individual relations *)

(** [ hzlth ] *)


Definition istranshzlth ( n m k  : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth m k -> hzlth n k := λ lnm lmk, istranshzgth _ _ _ lmk lnm .

Definition isirreflhzlth ( n : hz ) : neg ( hzlth n n ) := isirreflhzgth n .


n, m: hz
g: hzlth n m
n != m


n, m: hz
g: hzlth n m
n != m
 
n, m: hz
g: hzlth n m
n != m
 
n, m: hz
g: hzlth n m
e: n = m
∅
 
n, m: hz
g: hzlth m m
e: n = m
∅
 apply ( isirreflhzlth _ g ) . Defined .

Definition isasymmhzlth ( n m : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth m n -> empty := λ lnm lmn, isasymmhzgth _ _ lmn lnm .

Definition isantisymmneghztth  ( n m : hz ) : neg ( hzlth n m ) -> neg ( hzlth m n ) -> n = m := λ nlnm nlmn, isantisymmneghzgth _ _ nlmn nlnm .

Definition isnegrelhzlth : isnegrel hzlth := λ n m, isnegrelhzgth m n .


n, m: hz
¬ hzlth n m → hzlth m n ⨿ (n = m)

¬ hzlth n m → hzlth m n ⨿ (n = m)

nlnm: ¬ hzlth n m
e: m = n
hzlth m n ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: hz
nlnm: ¬ hzlth n m
e: m = n
hzlth m n ⨿ (n = m)
 apply ( ii2 ( pathsinv0 e ) ) . Defined .


n, m, k: hz
hzlth n k → hzlth n m ∨ hzlth m k


n, m, k: hz

lnk: hzlth n k
hzlth n m ∨ hzlth m k
 apply ( ( pr1 islogeqcommhdisj ) ( iscotranshzgth _ _ _ lnk ) )  .  Defined .



(**  [ hzleh ] *)



n, m, k: hz
hzleh n m → hzleh m k → hzleh n k


n, m, k: hz

n, m, k: hz
iscotrans hzgth
 
n, m, k: hz
∏ x1 x2 x3 : hz,
hzgth x1 x3 → hzgth x1 x2 ∨ hzgth x2 x3
 apply iscotranshzgth .  Defined.

Definition isreflhzleh ( n : hz ) : hzleh n n := isirreflhzgth n .

Definition isantisymmhzleh ( n m : hz ) : hzleh n m -> hzleh m n -> n = m := isantisymmneghzgth n m .


isnegrel hzleh


isnegrel hzleh
 
isdecrel hzleh
 apply isdecrelhzleh . Defined .

Definition iscoasymmhzleh ( n m : hz ) ( nl : neg ( hzleh n m ) ) : hzleh m n := negf ( isasymmhzgth _ _ ) nl .


istotal hzleh


istotal hzleh
 
x, y: hz
hzleh x y ∨ hzleh y x
 
x, y: hz
lxy: hzleh x y
hzleh x y ∨ hzleh y x
x, y: hz
lyx: ¬ hzleh x y
hzleh x y ∨ hzleh y x

hzleh x y ∨ hzleh y x
 
x, y: hz
lyx: ¬ hzleh x y
hzleh x y ⨿ hzleh y x
   
x, y: hz
lyx: ¬ hzleh x y
hzleh y x
 apply ( iscoasymmhzleh _ _ lyx ) .   Defined .



(**  [ hzgeh ] . *)


Definition istranshzgeh ( n m k : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh m k -> hzgeh n k := λ gnm gmk, istranshzleh _ _ _ gmk gnm .

Definition isreflhzgeh ( n : hz ) : hzgeh n n := isreflhzleh _ .

Definition isantisymmhzgeh ( n m : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh m n -> n = m := λ gnm gmn, isantisymmhzleh _ _ gmn gnm .

Definition isnegrelhzgeh : isnegrel hzgeh := λ n m, isnegrelhzleh m n .

Definition iscoasymmhzgeh ( n m : hz ) ( nl : neg ( hzgeh n m ) ) : hzgeh m n := iscoasymmhzleh _ _ nl .

Definition istotalhzgeh : istotal hzgeh := λ n m, istotalhzleh m n .




(** *** Simple implications between comparisons *)


n, m: hz
hzgth n m → hzgeh n m


n, m: hz
hzgth n m → hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
g: hzgth n m
hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
g: hzgth n m
¬ hzgeh m n
 apply ( todneg _ g ) . Defined .

Definition hzlthtoleh ( n m : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzleh n m := hzgthtogeh _ _ .


n, m: hz
hzleh n m → ¬ hzgth n m


n, m: hz
hzleh n m → ¬ hzgth n m
 
n, m: hz
is: hzleh n m
is': hzgth n m
∅
 apply ( is is' ) .  Defined .

Definition  hzgthtoneghzleh ( n m : hz ) : hzgth n m -> neg ( hzleh n m ) := λ g l , hzlehtoneghzgth _ _ l g .

Definition hzgehtoneghzlth ( n m : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> neg ( hzlth n m ) := λ gnm lnm, hzlehtoneghzgth _ _ gnm lnm .

Definition hzlthtoneghzgeh ( n m : hz ) : hzlth n m -> neg ( hzgeh n m ) := λ gnm lnm, hzlehtoneghzgth _ _ lnm gnm .

Definition neghzlehtogth ( n m : hz ) : neg ( hzleh n m ) -> hzgth n m := isnegrelhzgth n m .

Definition neghzgehtolth ( n m : hz ) : neg ( hzgeh n m ) -> hzlth n m := isnegrelhzlth n m .


n, m: hz

nl: ¬ hzleh n m

n, m: hz
ng: ¬ hzgth n m
nl: ¬ hzleh n m
hzleh n m
 destruct ( nl ng ) .  Defined .

Definition neghzlthtogeh ( n m : hz ) : neg ( hzlth n m ) -> hzgeh n m := λ nl, neghzgthtoleh _ _ nl .



(** *** Comparison alternatives *)

Definition hzlthorgeh ( n m : hz ) : ( hzlth n m ) ⨿ ( hzgeh n m ) := hzgthorleh _ _ .

l: hzleh n m
hzlth n m ⨿ (n = m)
 
n, m: hz
l: hzleh n m
l': hzlth n m
hzlth n m ⨿ (n = m)
n, m: hz
l: hzleh n m
g: hzgeh n m
hzlth n m ⨿ (n = m)

l: hzleh n m
g: hzgeh n m
hzlth n m ⨿ (n = m)
 apply ( ii2 ( isantisymmhzleh _ _ l g ) ) . Defined .

g: hzgeh n m
hzgth n m ⨿ (n = m)

g: hzgeh n m
l: hzleh n m
hzgth n m ⨿ (n = m)
  
n, m: hz
g: hzgeh n m
l: hzleh n m
hzgth n m ⨿ (n = m)
  apply ( ii2 ( isantisymmhzleh _ _ l g ) ) .  Defined .




(** *** Mixed transitivities *)




n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgeh m k → hzgth n k


n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgeh m k → hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgth n m
gmk: hzgeh m k
hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgth n m
gmk: hzgeh m k
g': hzgth m k
hzgth n k
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgth n m
gmk: hzgeh m k
e: m = k
hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgth n m
gmk: hzgeh m k
e: m = k
hzgth n k
  
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgth n k
gmk: hzgeh m k
e: m = k
hzgth n k
  apply gnm . Defined.


n, m, k: hz
hzgeh n m → hzgth m k → hzgth n k


n, m, k: hz
hzgeh n m → hzgth m k → hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgeh n m
gmk: hzgth m k
hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgeh n m
gmk: hzgth m k
g': hzgth n m
hzgth n k
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgeh n m
gmk: hzgth m k
e: n = m
hzgth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgeh n m
gmk: hzgth m k
e: n = m
hzgth n k
  
n, m, k: hz
gnm: hzgeh n m
gmk: hzgth m k
e: n = m
hzgth m k
  apply gmk . Defined.


n, m, k: hz
hzlth n m → hzleh m k → hzlth n k


n, m, k: hz
hzlth n m → hzleh m k → hzlth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
l1: hzlth n m
l2: hzleh m k
hzlth n k
 apply ( hzgehgthtrans k m n l2 l1 ) . Defined .


n, m, k: hz
hzleh n m → hzlth m k → hzlth n k


n, m, k: hz
hzleh n m → hzlth m k → hzlth n k
 
n, m, k: hz
l1: hzleh n m
l2: hzlth m k
hzlth n k
 apply ( hzgthgehtrans k m n l2 l1 ) . Defined .




(** *** Addition and comparisons  *)



(** [ hzgth ] *)



n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (k + n) (k + m)


n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
 apply ( pr1 ( isbinopabgrdiffrel nataddabmonoid isplushrelnatgth ) ) .   Defined .


n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (n + k) (m + k)


n, m, k: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (n + k) (m + k)
 apply ( pr2 ( isbinopabgrdiffrel nataddabmonoid isplushrelnatgth ) ) .  Defined .


n, m, k: hz
hzgth (k + n) (k + m) → hzgth n m


n, m, k: hz
hzgth (k + n) (k + m) → hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g':= hzgthandplusl (k + n) (k + m) (- k) g: hzgth (- k + (k + n)) (- k + (k + m))
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth (- k + (k + n)) (- k + (k + m))
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth (- k + k + n) (- k + (k + m))
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth (- k + k + n) (- k + k + m)
hzgth n m
  
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth (0 + n) (0 + m)
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth n (0 + m)
hzgth n m
   
n, m, k: hz
g: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
g': hzgth n m
hzgth n m
 apply g' .  Defined .


n, m, k: hz
hzgth (n + k) (m + k) → hzgth n m


n, m, k: hz
hzgth (n + k) (m + k) → hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
l: hzgth (n + k) (m + k)
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
l: hzgth (k + n) (m + k)
hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
l: hzgth (k + n) (k + m)
hzgth n m
 apply ( hzgthandpluslinv _ _ _ l )  . Defined .


n: hz
hzgth (n + 1) n


n: hz
hzgth (n + 1) n
 
n: hz
int:= hzgthandplusl 1 0 n
  (ct (hzgth, isdecrelhzgth, 1, 0)): hzgth (n + 1) (n + 0)
hzgth (n + 1) n
 
n: hz
int: hzgth (n + 1) (n + 0)
hzgth (n + 1) n
 
n: hz
int: hzgth (n + 1) n
hzgth (n + 1) n
   apply int . Defined .


(** [ hzlth ] *)


Definition hzlthandplusl ( n m k : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth ( k + n ) ( k + m )  := hzgthandplusl _ _ _ .

Definition hzlthandplusr ( n m k : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth ( n + k ) ( m + k ) := hzgthandplusr _ _ _ .

Definition hzlthandpluslinv  ( n m k : hz ) : hzlth ( k + n ) ( k + m ) -> hzlth n m := hzgthandpluslinv _ _ _ .

Definition hzlthandplusrinv ( n m k : hz ) :  hzlth ( n + k ) ( m + k ) -> hzlth n m := hzgthandplusrinv _ _ _ .

Definition hzlthnsn ( n : hz ) : hzlth n ( n + 1 ) := hzgthsnn n .



(** [ hzleh ] *)


Definition hzlehandplusl ( n m k : hz ) : hzleh n m -> hzleh ( k + n ) ( k + m ) := negf ( hzgthandpluslinv n m k )  .

Definition hzlehandplusr ( n m k : hz ) : hzleh n m -> hzleh ( n + k ) ( m + k ) := negf ( hzgthandplusrinv n m k )  .

Definition hzlehandpluslinv  ( n m k : hz ) : hzleh ( k + n ) ( k + m ) -> hzleh n m := negf ( hzgthandplusl n m k )  .

Definition hzlehandplusrinv ( n m k : hz ) :  hzleh ( n + k ) ( m + k ) -> hzleh n m :=  negf ( hzgthandplusr n m k ) .



(** [ hzgeh ] *)


Definition hzgehandplusl ( n m k : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh ( k + n ) ( k + m ) := negf ( hzgthandpluslinv m n k ) .

Definition hzgehandplusr ( n m k : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh ( n + k ) ( m + k ) := negf ( hzgthandplusrinv m n k )  .

Definition hzgehandpluslinv  ( n m k : hz ) : hzgeh ( k + n ) ( k + m ) -> hzgeh n m := negf ( hzgthandplusl m n k )  .

Definition hzgehandplusrinv ( n m k : hz ) :  hzgeh ( n + k ) ( m + k ) -> hzgeh n m :=  negf ( hzgthandplusr m n k ) .




(** *** Properties of [ hzgth ] in the terminology of  algebra1.v (continued below)

Note: at the moment we do not need properties of [ hzlth ] , [ hzleh ] and [ hzgeh ] in terminology of algebra1 since the corresponding relations on [ hq ] are bulid from [ hqgth ] . *)


isbinophrel hzgth


isbinophrel hzgth
 
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth a b → hzgth (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth a b → hzgth (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
 
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth a b → hzgth (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid
  apply hzgthandplusr .  Defined .


isinvbinophrel hzgth


isinvbinophrel hzgth
 
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth (c + a)%addmonoid (c + b)%addmonoid → hzgth a b
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid → hzgth a b
 
∏ a b c : hzaddabgr,
hzgth (a + c)%addmonoid (b + c)%addmonoid → hzgth a b
  apply hzgthandplusrinv .  Defined .


isringmultgt hz hzgth


isringmultgt hz hzgth
 apply ( isringrigtoringmultgt natcommrig isplushrelnatgth isrigmultgtnatgth )  . Defined .


isinvringmultgt hz hzgth


isinvringmultgt hz hzgth
 apply ( isinvringrigtoringmultgt natcommrig isplushrelnatgth isinvplushrelnatgth isinvrigmultgtnatgth ) . Defined .



(** *** Negation and comparisons *)

(** [ hzgth ] *)


n: hz
is: hzgth n 0
hzlth (- n) 0


n: hz
is: hzgth n 0
hzlth (- n) 0
 
n: hz
is: hzgth n 0
hzlth (- n) 0
 
n: hz
is: hzgth n 0
hzgth n 0%ring
 apply is . Defined .


n: hz
is: hzgth (- n) 0
hzlth n 0


n: hz
is: hzgth (- n) 0
hzlth n 0
 
n: hz
is: hzgth (- n) 0
hzlth n 0
 
n: hz
is: hzgth (- n) 0
hzgth (- n)%ring 0%ring
 apply is . Defined .


(** [ hzlth ] *)


n: hz
is: hzlth n 0
hzgth (- n) 0


n: hz
is: hzlth n 0
hzgth (- n) 0
 
n: hz
is: hzlth n 0
hzgth (- n) 0
 
n: hz
is: hzlth n 0
hzgth 0%ring n
 apply is . Defined .


n: hz
is: hzlth (- n) 0
hzgth n 0


n: hz
is: hzlth (- n) 0
hzgth n 0
 
n: hz
is: hzlth (- n) 0
hzgth n 0
  
n: hz
is: hzlth (- n) 0
hzgth 0%ring (- n)%ring
 apply is . Defined .

(* ??? Coq slows down on the proofs of these two lemmas for no good reason. *)


(** [ hzleh ] *)


n: hz
is: hzleh n 0
hzgeh (- n) 0


n: hz
is: hzleh n 0
hzgeh (- n) 0
 
n: hz
hzleh n 0 → hzgeh (- n) 0
 apply ( negf ( @hzminusandlth0 n ) ) . Defined .


n: hz
is: hzleh (- n) 0
hzgeh n 0


n: hz
is: hzleh (- n) 0
hzgeh n 0
 
n: hz
hzleh (- n) 0 → hzgeh n 0
 apply ( negf ( @hzlth0andminus n ) ) . Defined .



(** [ hzgeh ] *)


n: hz
is: hzgeh n 0
hzleh (- n) 0


n: hz
is: hzgeh n 0
hzleh (- n) 0
 
n: hz
hzgeh n 0 → hzleh (- n) 0
 apply ( negf ( @hzminusandgth0 n ) ) . Defined .


n: hz
is: hzgeh (- n) 0
hzleh n 0


n: hz
is: hzgeh (- n) 0
hzleh n 0
 
n: hz
hzgeh (- n) 0 → hzleh n 0
 apply ( negf ( @hzgth0andminus n ) ) . Defined .



(** *** Multiplication and comparisons  *)


(** [ hzgth ] *)



n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth n m → hzgth (k * n) (k * m)


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth n m → hzgth (k * n) (k * m)
 
∏ n m k : hz,
hzgth k 0 → hzgth n m → hzgth (k * n) (k * m)
 apply ( isringmultgttoislringmultgt _ isplushrelhzgth isringmulthzgth ) .   Defined .


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth n m → hzgth (n * k) (m * k)


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth n m → hzgth (n * k) (m * k)
 
∏ n m k : hz,
hzgth k 0 → hzgth n m → hzgth (n * k) (m * k)
 apply ( isringmultgttoisrringmultgt _ isplushrelhzgth isringmulthzgth ) . Defined .


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth (k * n) (k * m) → hzgth n m


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth (k * n) (k * m) → hzgth n m
 
n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
is': hzgth (k * n) (k * m)
hzgth n m
  apply ( isinvringmultgttoislinvringmultgt hz isplushrelhzgth isinvringmulthzgth n m k is is' ) .  Defined .


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth (n * k) (m * k) → hzgth n m


n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
hzgth (n * k) (m * k) → hzgth n m
   
n, m, k: hz
is: hzgth k 0
is': hzgth (n * k) (m * k)
hzgth n m
  apply ( isinvringmultgttoisrinvringmultgt hz isplushrelhzgth isinvringmulthzgth n m k is is' ) .  Defined .



(** [ hzlth ] *)


Definition hzlthandmultl ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth ( k * n ) ( k * m )  := hzgthandmultl _ _ _ is .

Definition hzlthandmultr ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth ( n * k ) ( m * k ) := hzgthandmultr _ _ _ is .

Definition hzlthandmultlinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzlth ( k * n ) ( k * m ) -> hzlth n m := hzgthandmultlinv _ _ _ is .

Definition hzlthandmultrinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzlth ( n * k ) ( m * k ) -> hzlth n m := hzgthandmultrinv _ _ _ is .


(** [ hzleh ] *)


Definition hzlehandmultl ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzleh n m -> hzleh ( k * n ) ( k * m ) := negf ( hzgthandmultlinv _ _ _ is ) .

Definition hzlehandmultr ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzleh n m -> hzleh ( n * k ) ( m * k ) := negf ( hzgthandmultrinv _ _ _ is ) .

Definition hzlehandmultlinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzleh ( k * n ) ( k * m ) -> hzleh n m := negf ( hzgthandmultl _ _ _ is )  .

Definition hzlehandmultrinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzleh ( n * k ) ( m * k ) -> hzleh n m := negf ( hzgthandmultr _ _ _ is ) .


(** [ hzgeh ] *)


Definition hzgehandmultl ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh ( k * n ) ( k * m ) := negf ( hzgthandmultlinv _ _ _ is ) .

Definition hzgehandmultr ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh ( n * k ) ( m * k )  := negf ( hzgthandmultrinv _ _ _ is ) .

Definition hzgehandmultlinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzgeh ( k * n ) ( k * m ) -> hzgeh n m := negf ( hzgthandmultl _ _ _ is )   .

Definition hzgehandmultrinv ( n m k : hz ) ( is : hzgth k 0 ) : hzgeh ( n * k ) ( m * k ) -> hzgeh n m := negf ( hzgthandmultr _ _ _ is )  .

(** *** [ hz ] as an integral domain *)



isintdom hz


isintdom hz
 
∏ a1 a2 : hz,
(a1 * a2)%ring = 0%ring → a1 = 0%ring ∨ a2 = 0%ring

e0: (a * b)%ring = 0%ring

  destruct ( hzgthtoneq _ _ ( hzmultlth0lth0 la lb ) e0 ) .  Defined .


Definition hzintdom : intdom := tpair _ _ isintdomhz .

Definition hzneq0andmult ( n m : hz ) ( isn : hzneq n 0 ) ( ism : hzneq m 0 ) : hzneq ( n * m ) 0 := intdomneq0andmult hzintdom n m isn ism .


a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: c * a = c * b
a = b


a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: c * a = c * b
a = b
 
a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: c * a = c * b
a = b
 apply ( intdomlcan hzintdom _ _ _ ne e ) . Defined .


a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: a * c = b * c
a = b


a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: a * c = b * c
a = b
 
a, b, c: hz
ne: c != 0
e: a * c = b * c
a = b
 apply ( intdomrcan hzintdom _ _ _ ne e ) . Defined .


n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, n * m)


n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, n * m)
  
n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, n * m)
  apply ( pr1 ( intdomiscancelable hzintdom n ne ) ) . Defined .


n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, m * n)


n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, m * n)
 
n: hz
ne: n != 0
isincl (λ m : hz, m * n)
 apply ( pr2 ( intdomiscancelable hzintdom n ne ) ) . Defined.






(** *** Comparisons and [ n -> n + 1 ] *)


n, m: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (n + 1) m


n, m: hz
hzgth n m → hzgth (n + 1) m
 
n, m: hz
is: hzgth n m
hzgth (n + 1) m
 apply ( istranshzgth _ _ _ ( hzgthsnn n ) is ) . Defined .

Definition hzlthtolths ( n m : hz ) : hzlth n m -> hzlth n ( m + 1 ) := hzgthtogths _ _ .


n, m: hz
hzleh n m → hzleh n (m + 1)


n, m: hz
hzleh n m → hzleh n (m + 1)
 
n, m: hz
is: hzleh n m
hzleh n (m + 1)
 apply ( istranshzleh _ _ _ is ( hzlthtoleh _ _ ( hzlthnsn _ ) ) ) . Defined .

Definition hzgehtogehs ( n m : hz ) : hzgeh n m -> hzgeh ( n + 1 ) m := hzlehtolehs _ _  .



(** *** Two comparisons and [ n -> n + 1 ] *)

∏ n m : hz, isaprop (hzgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))

n, m, n0, m0: hz
t: hzgth n0 m0
isofhlevel 1 (hzgeh n0 (m0 + 1))
 apply ( pr2 _ ) . 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz, isaprop (hzgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
hzgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1)

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m
→ hzgeh n (m + 1)
  
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
∏
x
 x' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig),
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x')
   → hzgeh
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x' + 1))
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x'))
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
∏
x
 x' : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig),
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x')
   → hzgeh
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x' + 1))
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x'))

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
make_hProp
  (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x')
   → hzgeh
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
       (setquotpr
          (binopeqrelabgrdiff
             (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x' + 1))
  (int
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x)
     (setquotpr
        (binopeqrelabgrdiff
           (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) x'))
  
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
R x x'
→ ¬ R (x' + make_dirprod 1%nat 0%nat)%addmonoid x

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth x x'
→ ¬ abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth
      (x' + make_dirprod 1%nat 0%nat)%addmonoid x
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
(∃ c0 : nataddabmonoid,
 (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)%addmonoid >
 (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0)%addmonoid)
→ ¬ (∃ c0 : nataddabmonoid,
     (pr1 (x' + make_dirprod 1%nat 0%nat) + pr2 x + c0)%addmonoid >
     (pr1 x + pr2 (x' + make_dirprod 1%nat 0%nat) + c0)%addmonoid)
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : nat,
   natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0) (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) =
   true)
→ ¬ ishinh_UU
      (∑ c0 : nat,
       natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
         (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true)

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
(∑ c0 : nat,
 natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0) (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) =
 true)
→ make_hProp
    (¬ ishinh_UU
         (∑ c0 : nat,
          natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
            (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) =
          true))
    (isapropneg
       (ishinh_UU
          (∑ c0 : nat,
           natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
             (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) =
           true)))

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
make_hProp
  (¬ ishinh_UU
       (∑ c0 : nat,
        natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
          (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true))
  (isapropneg
     (ishinh_UU
        (∑ c0 : nat,
         natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
           (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true)))
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
¬ ishinh_UU
    (∑ c0 : nat,
     natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
       (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true)
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
ishinh_UU
  (∑ c0 : nat,
   natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
     (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true) → ∅
  
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
(∑ c0 : nat,
 natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
   (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true)
→ make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

int: ∏ n m : hz,

t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,

n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: (λ c0 : nat,
 natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
   (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true) (pr1 t2)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))

x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)

  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')

r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty
 
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: (λ c0 : nat,
 natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
   (pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true)
  (pr1 t2')
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
r2': x2 + 1 + a1 > x1 + (a2 + 0)
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
r2': x2 + 1 + a1 > x1 + a2
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
r2': 1 + x2 + a1 > x1 + a2
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
r2': 1 + (x2 + a1) > x1 + a2
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       
n, m: hz
int: ∏ n m : hz,
isaprop (rigtoringrel natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m → hzgeh n (m + 1))
R:= abgrdiffrelint nataddabmonoid natgth: hrel
  (setwithbinopdirprod nataddabmonoid
     nataddabmonoid)
x, x': abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
t2: ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb (pr1 x + pr2 x' + c0)
  (pr1 x' + pr2 x + c0) = true
t2': ∑ c0 : nat,
natgtb ((pr1 x' + 1%nat)%ring + pr2 x + c0)
(pr1 x + (pr2 x' + 0%nat)%ring + c0) = true
x1:= pr1 x: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a1:= pr2 x: (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x)
x2:= pr1 x': rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
a2:= pr2 x': (λ _ : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
 rigaddabmonoid natcommrig) (pr1 x')
c1:= pr1 t2: nat
r1: pr1 (x1 + a2 + c1 > x2 + a1 + c1)
c2:= pr1 t2': nat
r2: pr1 (x2 + 1 + a1 + c2 > x1 + (a2 + 0) + c2)
r1': x1 + a2 > x2 + a1
r2': x1 + a2 ≤ x2 + a1
make_hProp ∅ isapropempty

       contradicts (natlehneggth r2') r1'.
Defined .


n, m: hz
hzgth (n + 1) m → hzgeh n m


n, m: hz
hzgth (n + 1) m → hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
a: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgeh n m
 
n, m: hz
a: hzgth (n + 1) m
hzgeh (n + 1) (m + 1)

(** *** Operations and comparisons on [ hz ] and [ natnattohz ] *)


xa1, xa2: nat × nat
is: hzgth
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa2)
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1

  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa1)
  (setquotpr

        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa2)
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1

  (setquotpr

  (setquotpr

is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1

is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
→ pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1

is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
(∑ a0 : nat,
 pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
→ pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1

is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
t2: ∑ a0 : nat,
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1
  
xa1, xa2: nat × nat
is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
t2: ∑ a0 : nat,
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0
a0:= pr1 t2: nat
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1
 
xa1, xa2: nat × nat
is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
t2: ∑ a0 : nat,
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0
a0:= pr1 t2: nat
g: (λ a0 : nat,
 pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
  (pr1 t2)

is: ishinh_UU
  (∑ a0 : nat,
   pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 >
   pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
t2: ∑ a0 : nat,
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0
a0:= pr1 t2: nat
g: pr1
  (pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 + a0 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1 + a0)
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 > pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1
 apply ( natgthandplusrinv _ _ a0 g ) . Defined .

is: hzlth
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff

  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa1)
  (setquotpr
     (binopeqrelabgrdiff
        (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)) xa2)
pr1 xa1 + pr2 xa2 < pr1 xa2 + pr2 xa1
 apply ( natnattohzandgth xa2 xa1 is ) .  Defined .



(** *** Canonical rig homomorphism from [ nat ] to [ hz ] *)

Definition nattohz : nat -> hz := λ n, setquotpr _ ( make_dirprod n 0%nat ) .

Definition isinclnattohz : isincl nattohz := isincltoringdiff natcommrig ( λ n, isinclnatplusr n ) .

Definition nattohzandneq ( n m : nat ) ( is : natnegpaths n m ) : hzneq ( nattohz n ) ( nattohz m ) := negf ( invmaponpathsincl _ isinclnattohz n m ) is .

Definition nattohzand0 : ( nattohz 0%nat ) = 0 := idpath _ .

Definition nattohzandS ( n : nat ) : ( nattohz ( S n ) ) = ( 1 + nattohz n ) := isbinop1funtoringdiff natcommrig 1%nat n .

Definition nattohzand1 : ( nattohz 1%nat ) = 1 := idpath _ .


∏ n : nat, nattorig n = nattohz n


∏ n : nat, nattorig n = nattohz n

  
nattorig 0 = nattohz 0
n: nat
IHn: nattorig n = nattohz n
nattorig (S n) = nattohz (S n)

  
nattorig 0 = nattohz 0
 
0%addmonoid =
setquotpr (eqrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig))
  (make_dirprod 0%nat 0%nat)

    reflexivity.
  
n: nat
IHn: nattorig n = nattohz n
nattorig (S n) = nattohz (S n)
 
n: nat
IHn: nattorig n = nattohz n
(1%rig + nattohz n)%ring = nattohz (S n)

    apply pathsinv0, nattohzandS.
Qed.

Definition nattohzandplus ( n m : nat ) : ( nattohz ( n + m )%nat ) = ( nattohz n + nattohz m ) := isbinop1funtoringdiff natcommrig n m .


n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) = nattohz n - nattohz m


n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) = nattohz n - nattohz m
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) = nattohz n - nattohz m
  
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) + nattohz m =
nattohz n - nattohz m + nattohz m
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) + nattohz m =
nattohz n + - nattohz m + nattohz m
  
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) + nattohz m =
nattohz n + (- nattohz m + nattohz m)
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) + nattohz m = nattohz n + 0
   
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m) + nattohz m = nattohz n
  
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz (n - m + m) = nattohz n
  
n, m: nat
is: n ≥ m
nattohz n = nattohz n
 apply idpath . Defined .

Opaque nattohzandminus .


n, m: nat
nattohz (n * m) = nattohz n * nattohz m


n, m: nat
nattohz (n * m) = nattohz n * nattohz m
 
n, m: nat
nattohz (n * m) = nattohz n * nattohz m
 
n, m: nat
nattohz (n * m) = nattohz n * nattohz m
 
n, m: nat
toringdiff natcommrig (n * m)%nat =
toringdiff natcommrig n * toringdiff natcommrig m
 apply ( isbinop2funtoringdiff natcommrig n m ) . Defined .

Definition nattohzandgth ( n m : nat ) ( is : natgth n m ) : hzgth ( nattohz n ) ( nattohz m ) := iscomptoringdiff natcommrig isplushrelnatgth n m is .

Definition nattohzandlth ( n m : nat ) ( is : natlth n m ) : hzlth ( nattohz n ) ( nattohz m ) := nattohzandgth m n is .


n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)


n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)
 
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
l: n < m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
e: n = m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)
   
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
e: n = m
hzleh (nattohz n) (nattohz m)
  
n, m: nat
is: n ≤ m
e: n = m
hzleh (nattohz m) (nattohz m)
  apply ( isreflhzleh ) .  Defined .

Definition nattohzandgeh ( n m : nat ) ( is : natgeh n m ) : hzgeh ( nattohz n ) ( nattohz m ) := nattohzandleh _ _ is .

(** *** Addition and subtraction on [ nat ] and [ hz ] *)



(** *** Absolute value on [ hz ] *)


nat × nat → nat


nat × nat → nat
 
nm: nat × nat
nat
 
nm: nat × nat
h: pr1 nm > pr2 nm
nat
nm: nat × nat
h: pr1 nm ≤ pr2 nm
nat
  
nm: nat × nat
h: pr1 nm ≤ pr2 nm
nat
 apply ( sub ( pr2 nm ) ( pr1 nm ) ) . Defined .


iscomprelfun (hrelabgrdiff nataddabmonoid) hzabsvalint


iscomprelfun (hrelabgrdiff nataddabmonoid) hzabsvalint
 
∏ x x' : nat × nat,
hrelabgrdiff nataddabmonoid x x'
→ hzabsvalint x = hzabsvalint x'
  
x, x': nat × nat
hrelabgrdiff nataddabmonoid x x'
→ hzabsvalint x = hzabsvalint x'
 
x, x': nat × nat
(∃ x0 : nataddabmonoid,
 (pr1 x + pr2 x' + x0)%addmonoid =
 (pr1 x' + pr2 x + x0)%addmonoid)
→ hzabsvalint x = hzabsvalint x'
 
x, x': nat × nat
ishinh_UU
  (∑ x0 : nat,
   (pr1 x + pr2 x' + x0)%nat =
   (pr1 x' + pr2 x + x0)%nat)
→ hzabsvalint x = hzabsvalint x'
 
x, x': nat × nat
(∑ x0 : nat,
 (pr1 x + pr2 x' + x0)%nat = (pr1 x' + pr2 x + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp (hzabsvalint x = hzabsvalint x')
    (isasetnat (hzabsvalint x) (hzabsvalint x'))
  
x, x': nat × nat
(∑ x0 : nat,
 (pr1 x + pr2 x' + x0)%nat = (pr1 x' + pr2 x + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match natgthorleh (pr1 x) (pr2 x) with
     | inl _ => (pr1 x - pr2 x)%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x - pr1 x)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
     | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match natgthorleh (pr1 x) (pr2 x) with
       | inl _ => (pr1 x - pr2 x)%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x - pr1 x)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
       | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
       end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
(∑ x0 : nat,
 (n + pr2 x' + x0)%nat = (pr1 x' + pr2 x + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match natgthorleh n (pr2 x) with
     | inl _ => (n - pr2 x)%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x - n)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
     | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match natgthorleh n (pr2 x) with
       | inl _ => (n - pr2 x)%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x - n)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
       | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
       end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
(∑ x0 : nat,
 (n + pr2 x' + x0)%nat = (pr1 x' + m + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match natgthorleh n m with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
     | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match natgthorleh n m with
       | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
       | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh (pr1 x') (pr2 x') with
       | inl _ => (pr1 x' - pr2 x')%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x' - pr1 x')%nat
       end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
(∑ x0 : nat, (n + pr2 x' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match natgthorleh n m with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh n' (pr2 x') with
     | inl _ => (n' - pr2 x')%nat
     | inr _ => (pr2 x' - n')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match natgthorleh n m with
       | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
       | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh n' (pr2 x') with
       | inl _ => (n' - pr2 x')%nat
       | inr _ => (pr2 x' - n')%nat
       end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
m':= pr2 x' : nat: nat
(∑ x0 : nat, (n + m' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match natgthorleh n m with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh n' m' with
     | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
     | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match natgthorleh n m with
       | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
       | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh n' m' with
       | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
       | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
       end)
   
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
m':= pr2 x' : nat: nat
int:= natgthorleh n m: (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
(∑ x0 : nat, (n + m' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match int with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end =
     match natgthorleh n' m' with
     | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
     | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match int with
       | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
       | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
       end
       match natgthorleh n' m' with
       | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
       | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
       end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
m':= pr2 x' : nat: nat
int:= natgthorleh n m: (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
int':= natgthorleh n' m': (n' > m') ⨿ (n' ≤ m')
(∑ x0 : nat, (n + m' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat)
→ make_hProp
    (match int with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end =
     match int' with
     | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
     | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
     end)
    (isasetnat
       match int with
       | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
       | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
       end
       match int' with
       | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
       | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
       end)
   
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
m':= pr2 x' : nat: nat
int:= natgthorleh n m: (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
int':= natgthorleh n' m': (n' > m') ⨿ (n' ≤ m')
tt0: ∑ x0 : nat,
(n + m' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat
make_hProp
  (match int with
   | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
   | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
   end =
   match int' with
   | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
   | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
   end)
  (isasetnat
     match int with
     | inl _ => (n - m)%nat
     | inr _ => (m - n)%nat
     end
     match int' with
     | inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
     | inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
     end)
 
x, x': nat × nat
n:= pr1 x : nat: nat
m:= pr2 x : nat: nat
n':= pr1 x' : nat: nat
m':= pr2 x' : nat: nat
int:= natgthorleh n m: (n > m) ⨿ (n ≤ m)
int':= natgthorleh n' m': (n' > m') ⨿ (n' ≤ m')
tt0: ∑ x0 : nat,
(n + m' + x0)%nat = (n' + m + x0)%nat
match int with
| inl _ => (n - m)%nat
| inr _ => (m - n)%nat
end =
match int' with
| inl _ => (n' - m')%nat
| inr _ => (m' - n')%nat
end

  (setquotpr

l': pr1 (pr1 xa < pr2 xa)
(match natgthorleh (pr1 xa) (pr2 xa) with
 | inl _ => pr1 xa - pr2 xa
 | inr _ => pr2 xa - pr1 xa
 end + pr1 xa)%nat = pr2 xa

Definition hzabsvalneq0 { x : hz } ne := neg_to_negProp (nP := natneq _ _) (negf ( @hzabsvaleq0 x ) ne).

(** *** Some common equalities on integers *)
(** These lemmas are used for example in Complexes.v to construct complexes. *)
Local Opaque hz isdecrelhzeq iscommringops.


i: hz
hzbooleq i i = true


i: hz
hzbooleq i i = true

  
i: hz
decreltobrel hzdeceq i i = true
 
i: hz
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i ⨿ ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i, true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, false) (pr2 hzdeceq i i) =
true
 
i: hz
T: pr1 hzdeceq i i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i ⨿ ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i, true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, false) (inl T) = true
i: hz
F: ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i ⨿ ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i, true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, false) (inr F) = true

  
i: hz
T: pr1 hzdeceq i i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i ⨿ ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i, true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, false) (inl T) = true
 apply idpath.
  
i: hz
F: ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i ⨿ ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, bool)
  (λ _ : pr1 hzdeceq i i, true)
  (λ _ : ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i, false) (inr F) = true
 
i: hz
F: ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i
∅
 
i: hz
F: ¬ pr1 hzdeceq i i
pr1 hzdeceq i i
 apply idpath.
Qed.


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1) = false


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1) = false

  
i: hz
¬ hzdeceq i (i + 1)

  
1 != 0

  confirm_not_equal isdecrelhzeq.
Qed.


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1) = false


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1) = false

  (* prove it again, to illustrate how to avoid the tactic [confirm_not_equal] *)
  
i: hz
¬ hzdeceq i (i + 1)

  
1 != 0

  
decreltobrel (deceq_to_decrel isdecrelhzeq) 1 0 =
false

  reflexivity.
Qed.


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1 + 1) = false


i: hz
hzbooleq i (i + 1 + 1) = false

  
i: hz
¬ hzdeceq i (i + 1 + 1)

  
i: hz
¬ hzdeceq i (i + (1 + 1))

  
1 + 1 != 0

  confirm_not_equal isdecrelhzeq.
Qed.


i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
∅


i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
∅

  
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
true = false

  
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
true = hzbooleq i0 (i0 + 1)

  
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
true = hzbooleq i0 i
 
i, i0: hz
e: hzeq i i0
e': hzeq i (i0 + 1)
true = hzbooleq i i

  apply (! (hzeqbooleqii i)).
Qed.


i: hz
e': hzeq i (i + 1)
∅


i: hz
e': hzeq i (i + 1)
∅

  
i: hz
e': hzeq i (i + 1)
true = false
 
i: hz
e': hzeq i (i + 1)
true = hzbooleq i (i + 1)
 
i: hz
e': hzeq i (i + 1)
true = hzbooleq i i

  apply (! (hzeqbooleqii i)).
Qed.


i: hz
e: hzeq i (i + 1 + 1)
∅


i: hz
e: hzeq i (i + 1 + 1)
∅

  
i: hz
e: hzeq i (i + 1 + 1)
tmp:= hzbooleqissi i: hzbooleq i (i + 1 + 1) = false

i: hz
e: i = i + 1 + 1
tmp:= hzbooleqissi i: hzbooleq i (i + 1 + 1) = false

i: hz
e: i = i + 1 + 1
tmp: hzbooleq i i = false
∅

  
i: hz
e: i = i + 1 + 1
tmp: true = false
∅
 
i: hz
e: i = i + 1 + 1
tmp: true = false
true = false
 apply tmp.
Qed.

e': n + i = m + i

n, m, i: hz

e': n + i = m + i

n, m, i: hz
e: n != m
e': n + i = m + i
n = m
 exact (hzplusrcan _ _ i e').
Qed.

Local Transparent hz isdecrelhzeq iscommringops.

(** *** [hz] is an archimedean ring *)

Local Open Scope hz_scope .


isarchring hzgth


isarchring hzgth

  
1%rig > 0%rig
istrans natgth
isarchrig (setquot_aux natgth)

  
1%rig > 0%rig
 reflexivity.
  
istrans natgth
 
n, m: natcommrig
∏ x3 : natcommrig, n > m → m > x3 → n > x3

    apply istransnatgth.
  
isarchrig (setquot_aux natgth)
 
isinvbinophrel natgth
isarchrig natgth

    
isinvbinophrel natgth
 
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
(c + a)%addmonoid > (c + b)%addmonoid → a > b
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
(a + c)%addmonoid > (b + c)%addmonoid → a > b

      
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
(c + a)%addmonoid > (c + b)%addmonoid → a > b
 apply natgthandpluslinv.
      
∏ a b c : rigaddabmonoid natcommrig,
(a + c)%addmonoid > (b + c)%addmonoid → a > b
 apply natgthandplusrinv.
    
isarchrig natgth
 apply isarchnat.
Qed.


∏ x : hz,
hzgth x 0 → ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1


∏ x : hz,
hzgth x 0 → ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
(∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring)
→ ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
(∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring)
→ ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
hzgth (nattohz (pr1 n) * x) 1

  
x: hz
Hx: hzgth x 0
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n * x)%ring 1%ring
hzgth (nattorig (pr1 n) * x) 1

  exact (pr2 n).
Qed.


∏ x : hz, ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x


∏ x : hz, ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x

  
x: hz
∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x

  
x: hz
(∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n) x)
→ ∃ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x

  
x: hz
(∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n) x)
→ ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x

  
x: hz
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n) x
∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattohz n) x

  
x: hz
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n) x
hzgth (nattohz (pr1 n)) x

  
x: hz
n: ∑ n : nat, hzgth (nattoring n) x
hzgth (nattorig (pr1 n)) x

  exact (pr2 n).
Qed.


(** **** hz -> abgr, 1 ↦ x, n ↦ x + x + ... + x  (n times), [hz_abmonoid_abelian_group_morphism] *)

X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid
nat_to_monoid_fun x (S (S n)) =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) + x)%addmonoid

x: X
nat_to_monoid_fun x 1%nat =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x 0%nat + x)%addmonoid
 exact (commax X x (unel X)).
  
X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid
nat_to_monoid_fun x (S (S n)) =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) + x)%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid
(x +
 (x +
  nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
    (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n))%addmonoid =
(x +
 nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n + x)%addmonoid
 
X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid
(x +
 (x +
  nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
    (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n))%addmonoid =
(x +
 (nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
    (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n + x))%addmonoid

x: X

(x +
 nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n)%addmonoid =
(nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0

X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid

 use idpath.
    
X: abmonoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n) = (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid
(x +
 nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n)%addmonoid =
(nat_rect (λ _ : nat, pr1 X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : pr1 X), x + IHn) n + x)%addmonoid
 exact (commax X x _).
Qed.

x: X
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat,
nat_to_monoid_fun x (n + m)%nat =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x n + nat_to_monoid_fun x m)%addmonoid
m: nat
nat_rect (λ _ : nat, X) 0%addmonoid
  (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : X), (x + IHn)%addmonoid) (n + m) =
(nat_rect (λ _ : nat, X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : X), x + IHn) n +
 nat_to_monoid_fun x m)%addmonoid

    
X: monoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat,
nat_to_monoid_fun x (n + m)%nat =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x n + nat_to_monoid_fun x m)%addmonoid

 use idpath.
    
X: monoid
x: X
n: nat
IHn: ∏ m : nat,
nat_to_monoid_fun x (n + m)%nat =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x n + nat_to_monoid_fun x m)%addmonoid
m: nat
nat_rect (λ _ : nat, X) 0%addmonoid
  (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : X), (x + IHn)%addmonoid) (n + m) =
(nat_rect (λ _ : nat, X) 0
   (λ (_ : nat) (IHn : X), x + IHn) n +
 nat_to_monoid_fun x m)%addmonoid
 exact (IHn m).
Qed.

x: X
natset × natset → X

X

             (nat_to_monoid_fun (grinv X x) (dirprod_pr2 n))).
Defined.

X: abgr
x: X
n: nat

n: nat
x = x

n: nat
(0%addmonoid - x)%abgr = (- x)%abgr

n: nat
x = x
 use idpath.

x: X
n: nat
(0%addmonoid - x)%abgr = (- x)%abgr
 use (lunax X).
Qed.

n1, n2, m, k: nat

   (dirprod_pr1 (make_dirprod n1 m)) +

   (dirprod_pr2 (make_dirprod n1 m)))%addmonoid =

n1, n2, m, k: nat

   (dirprod_pr1 (make_dirprod n1 m)) +

   (dirprod_pr2 (make_dirprod n1 m)))%addmonoid =

 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr (S m))%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x n2 +

(nat_to_monoid_fun x n1 +

(nat_to_monoid_fun x n2 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr (S k))%addmonoid

ishinh_UU

 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr (dirprod_pr2 x2))%addmonoid

x: X
x1: nat
e1: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
IHx1: ∏ x' : nat × nat,
ishinh_UU
  (∑ x0 : nat,
   (x1 + pr2 x' + x0)%nat =
   (pr1 x' + e1 + x0)%nat)

   nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1)%addmonoid =
  (nat_to_monoid_fun x (dirprod_pr1 x') +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr
     (dirprod_pr2 x'))%addmonoid
x2: nat × nat
H1: nat
H2: S (x1 + pr2 x2 + H1) = (pr1 x2 + e1 + H1)%nat
(nat_to_monoid_fun x (S x1) +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1)%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x (dirprod_pr1 x2) +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr (dirprod_pr2 x2))%addmonoid

  (∑ x0 : nat,
   (x1 + S e2 + x0)%nat = (x2 + e1 + x0)%nat)
tmp:= IHx1 (make_dirprod x2 (S e2)) HH: (nat_to_monoid_fun x x1 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1)%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x
   (dirprod_pr1 (make_dirprod x2 (S e2))) +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr
   (dirprod_pr2 (make_dirprod x2 (S e2))))%addmonoid
(x +
 (nat_to_monoid_fun x x1 +
  nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1))%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x x2 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e2)%addmonoid
 
X: abgr
x: X
x1: nat
e1: rigaddabmonoid natcommrig
IHx1: ∏ x' : nat × nat,
ishinh_UU
  (∑ x0 : nat,
   (x1 + pr2 x' + x0)%nat =
   (pr1 x' + e1 + x0)%nat)
→ (nat_to_monoid_fun x x1 +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1)%addmonoid =
  (nat_to_monoid_fun x (dirprod_pr1 x') +
   nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr
     (dirprod_pr2 x'))%addmonoid
x2, e2, H1: nat
H2: S (x1 + e2 + H1) = (x2 + e1 + H1)%nat
HH: ishinh_UU
  (∑ x0 : nat,
   (x1 + S e2 + x0)%nat = (x2 + e1 + x0)%nat)
tmp:= IHx1 (make_dirprod x2 (S e2)) HH: (nat_to_monoid_fun x x1 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1)%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x x2 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr (S e2))%addmonoid
(x +
 (nat_to_monoid_fun x x1 +
  nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e1))%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun x x2 +
 nat_to_monoid_fun (- x)%abgr e2)%addmonoid

(** Commutativity of the following diagram

                          nat × nat -- nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism --->  X
        hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism |                                               ||
                             hz -------- hz_abmonoid_abelian_group_morphism -------------> X
 *)

X: abgr
x: X
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
     (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism x)) =
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism x


X: abgr
x: X
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
     (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism x)) =
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism x

  
X: abgr
x: X
∏
x0 : abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
       (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig),
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
     (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism x)) x0 =
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism x x0
 
X: abgr
x: X
n: abmonoiddirprod (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
  (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)
composite_abelian_monoid_morphism
  hz_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism
  (abelian_group_to_monoid_morphism
     (hz_abgr_fun_abelian_group_morphism x)) n =
nat_nat_prod_abmonoid_abelian_monoid_morphism x n
 use setquotunivcomm.
Qed.

Opaque nat_to_monoid_fun.

f: abelian_group_morphism X Y

x: X

nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) 0%nat
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
f (nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n)) =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) (S n)

  
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
f (nat_to_monoid_fun x 0%nat) =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) 0%nat
 apply (monoidfununel f).
  
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
f (nat_to_monoid_fun x (S n)) =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) (S n)
 
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n + x)%addmonoid =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) (S n)

    
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
(f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) + f x)%addmonoid =
nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) (S n)

    
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
(f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) + f x)%addmonoid =
(nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n + f x)%addmonoid

    
X, Y: abgr
f: abelian_group_morphism X Y
x: X
n: nat
IHn: f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n
f (nat_to_monoid_fun x n) = nat_to_monoid_fun (f x) n

    exact IHn.
Qed.
Transparent nat_to_monoid_fun.

(** Some more facts about integers added by D. Grayson  *)

Definition ℤ := hzaddabgr.
Definition toℤ (n:nat) : ℤ := nattohz n.
Definition toℤneg (n:nat) : ℤ := natnattohz O n.
Definition zero := toℤ 0.
Definition one := toℤ 1.


n: nat
hzabsval (natnattohz n 0) = n


n: nat
hzabsval (natnattohz n 0) = n

  
n: nat
hzabsval (natnattohz n 0) = n
 
n: nat
setquotuniv (hrelabgrdiff nataddabmonoid) natset
  hzabsvalint hzabsvalintcomp (natnattohz n 0) = n
 
n: nat
pr1image (λ x : natnattohz n 0, hzabsvalint (pr1 x))
  (hinhuniv
     (prtoimage
        (λ x : natnattohz n 0, hzabsvalint (pr1 x)))
     (eqax0 (pr2 (natnattohz n 0)))) = n
 
n: nat
hzabsvalint (make_dirprod n 0%nat) = n

  
n: nat
match
  natgthorleh (pr1 (make_dirprod n 0%nat))
    (pr2 (make_dirprod n 0%nat))
with
| inl _ =>
    (pr1 (make_dirprod n 0) - pr2 (make_dirprod n 0))%nat
| inr _ =>
    (pr2 (make_dirprod n 0) - pr1 (make_dirprod n 0))%nat
end = n
 
n: nat
match natgthorleh n 0 with
| inl _ => (n - 0)%nat
| inr _ => 0%nat
end = n
 
n: nat
h: n > 0
(n - 0)%nat = n
n: nat
h: n ≤ 0
0%nat = n

  
n: nat
h: n > 0
(n - 0)%nat = n
 apply natminuseqn. 
n: nat
h: n ≤ 0
0%nat = n
 
n: nat
h: n ≤ 0
0%nat = n
 exact (! (natleh0tois0 h)). }
Defined.


m, n: nat
- natnattohz m n = natnattohz n m


m, n: nat
- natnattohz m n = natnattohz n m

  reflexivity.             (* don't change the proof *)
Defined.


m: nat
- nattohz m = natnattohz 0 m


m: nat
- nattohz m = natnattohz 0 m

  reflexivity.             (* don't change the proof *)
Defined.


i: hz
- - i = i


i: hz
- - i = i

  apply (grinvinv ℤ).
Defined.

Definition hz_normal_form (i:ℤ) :=
  coprod (∑ n, natnattohz n 0 = i)
         (∑ n, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i).

Definition hznf_pos n := _,, inl (n,,idpath _) : total2 hz_normal_form.

Definition hznf_neg n := _,, inr (n,,idpath _) : total2 hz_normal_form.

Definition hznf_zero := hznf_pos 0.

Definition hznf_neg_one := hznf_neg 0.


i: ℤ
hz_normal_form i

hz_normal_form i

hz_normal_form i

hz_normal_form i

s: hzgeh i 0
hz_normal_form i

b: i != 0

d: hzabsval i > 0

b: i != 0
c: natneq (hzabsval i) 0
d: hzabsval i > 0
f: hzabsval i ≥ 1
g: (1 + (hzabsval i - 1))%nat = hzabsval i
∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i
 
i: ℤ
r: hzlth i 0
a: nattohz (hzabsval i) = - i
b: i != 0
c: natneq (hzabsval i) 0
d: hzabsval i > 0
f: hzabsval i ≥ 1
g: S (hzabsval i - 1) = hzabsval i
∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i
 
i: ℤ
r: hzlth i 0
a: nattohz (hzabsval i) = - i

g: S (hzabsval i - 1) = hzabsval i
natnattohz 0 (S (hzabsval i - 1)) = i

    
i: ℤ

i: ℤ

b: i != 0
c: natneq (hzabsval i) 0
d: hzabsval i > 0
f: hzabsval i ≥ 1
g: S (hzabsval i - 1) = hzabsval i
- natnattohz 0 (hzabsval i) = - i
 exact a.

Defined.

e: nattohz m = - nattohz (S n)
∅
 
m, n: nat
d: - nattohz m = - - nattohz (S n)
∅

  
m, n: nat
d: - nattohz m = nattohz (S n)
∅

  
m, n: nat
f: nattohz m + - nattohz m =
nattohz m + nattohz (S n)
∅

  
m, n: nat
f: nattohz m - nattohz m = nattohz m + nattohz (S n)
∅

  
m, n: nat
f: 0 = nattohz m + nattohz (S n)
∅
 
m, n: nat
f: 0 = nattohz (m + S n)
∅

  
m, n: nat
g: 0%addmonoid = (m + S n)%nat
∅
 
m, n: nat
g: 0%addmonoid = (S n + m)%nat
∅

  exact (negpaths0sx _ g).
Defined.

n: nat

p': nattohz (S m) = - i
q': nattohz (S n) = - i
c: S m,, p' = S n,, q'
e: m = n
pr1 (n,, q) = pr1 (m,, p)
 exact (!e). }
Defined.

Definition negpos_weq := make_weq _ negpos' : weq (total2 hz_normal_form) ℤ.

∏ y : ℤ, ?f (?g y) = y

ℤ → nat ⨿ nat
∏ x : nat ⨿ nat,
?g
  ((λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
    match X with
    | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
    | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
    end) x) = x
∏ y : ℤ,
(λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
 match X with
 | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
 | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
 end) (?g y) = y

 exact (inl m). } 
∏ x : nat ⨿ nat,
(λ i : ℤ,
 let h := hz_to_normal_form i in
 match h with
 | inl t =>
     (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz n 0 = i,
      (λ (n : nat) (_ : natnattohz n 0 = i), inr n)
        (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
 | inr t =>
     (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i,
      (λ (m : nat) (_ : natnattohz 0 (S m) = i), inl m)
        (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
 end)
  ((λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
    match X with
    | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
    | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
    end) x) = x
∏ y : ℤ,
(λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
 match X with
 | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
 | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
 end)
  ((λ i : ℤ,
    let h := hz_to_normal_form i in
    match h with
    | inl t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz n 0 = i,
         (λ (n : nat) (_ : natnattohz n 0 = i), inr n)
           (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    | inr t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i,
         (λ (m : nat) (_ : natnattohz 0 (S m) = i),
          inl m) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    end) y) = y

  
∏ x : nat ⨿ nat,
(λ i : ℤ,
 let h := hz_to_normal_form i in
 match h with
 | inl t =>
     (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz n 0 = i,
      (λ (n : nat) (_ : natnattohz n 0 = i), inr n)
        (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
 | inr t =>
     (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i,
      (λ (m : nat) (_ : natnattohz 0 (S m) = i), inl m)
        (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
 end)
  ((λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
    match X with
    | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
    | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
    end) x) = x
 
n': nat
(let h := hz_to_normal_form (natnattohz 0 (S n')) in
 match h with
 | inl t => inr (pr1 t)
 | inr t => inl (pr1 t)
 end) = inl n'

(let h := hz_to_normal_form (natnattohz n 0) in
 match h with
 | inl t => inr (pr1 t)
 | inr t => inl (pr1 t)
 end) = inr n

 match h with

 | inr t => inl (pr1 t)
 end) = inl n'

n': nat
inl n' = inl n'
 reflexivity. 
n: nat
(let h := hz_to_normal_form (natnattohz n 0) in
 match h with
 | inl t => inr (pr1 t)

 end) = inr n

∏ y : ℤ,
(λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
 match X with
 | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
 | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
 end)
  ((λ i : ℤ,
    let h := hz_to_normal_form i in
    match h with
    | inl t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz n 0 = i,
         (λ (n : nat) (_ : natnattohz n 0 = i), inr n)
           (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    | inr t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i,
         (λ (m : nat) (_ : natnattohz 0 (S m) = i),
          inl m) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    end) y) = y

  
∏ y : ℤ,
(λ X : nat ⨿ nat,
 match X with
 | inl n => (λ n' : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n')) n
 | inr n => (λ n0 : nat, natnattohz n0 0) n
 end)
  ((λ i : ℤ,
    let h := hz_to_normal_form i in
    match h with
    | inl t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz n 0 = i,
         (λ (n : nat) (_ : natnattohz n 0 = i), inr n)
           (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    | inr t =>
        (λ t0 : ∑ n : nat, natnattohz 0 (S n) = i,
         (λ (m : nat) (_ : natnattohz 0 (S m) = i),
          inl m) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0)) t
    end) y) = y
 
∏
y : setquot (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig)),
match
  match hz_to_normal_form y with
  | inl t => inr (pr1 t)
  | inr t => inl (pr1 t)
  end
with
| inl n => natnattohz 0 (S n)
| inr n => natnattohz n 0
end = y
 
i: setquot (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig))
match
  match hz_to_normal_form i with
  | inl t => inr (pr1 t)
  | inr t => inl (pr1 t)
  end
with
| inl n => natnattohz 0 (S n)
| inr n => natnattohz n 0
end = i

    
i: setquot (hrelabgrdiff (rigaddabmonoid natcommrig))
n: nat

natnattohz n 0 = i

 exact p.

 exact q. } }
Defined.


x, y: hz
- (x + y) = - x + - y


x, y: hz
- (x + y) = - x + - y

  
x, y: hz
- (x + y) = - x + - y
 
x, y: hz
- (x + y) + (x + y) = - x + - y + (x + y)
 
x, y: hz
0 = - x + - y + (x + y)

  
x, y: hz
0 = - y + - x + (x + y)
 
x, y: hz
0 = - y + (- x + (x + y))

  
x, y: hz
0 = - y + (- x + x + y)
 
x, y: hz
0 = - y + (0 + y)
 
x, y: hz
0 = - y + y

  
x, y: hz
0 = 0
 reflexivity.
Defined.
